metadata.significance: Describes angels of death and the story of Moses and Pharaoh

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلنَّـٰزِعَـٰتِ غَرْقًا

translations.en_sahih: By those [angels] who extract with violence
translations.en_yusufali: By the (angels) who tear out (the souls of the wicked) with violence;
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi (makhluk-makhluk) yang mencabut (apa yang ditugaskan mencabutnya) dengan cara yang sekasar-kasarnya;

translations.en_sahih: And [by] those who remove with ease
translations.en_yusufali: By those who gently draw out (the souls of the blessed);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan yang menarik (apa yang ditugaskan menariknya) dengan cara yang selembut-lembutnya;

translations.en_sahih: And [by] those who glide [as if] swimming
translations.en_yusufali: And by those who glide along (on errands of mercy),
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi (makhluk-makhluk) yang cergas bergerak (menerima perintah) dengan gerak yang secergas-cergasnya;

translations.en_sahih: And those who race each other in a race
translations.en_yusufali: Then press forward as in a race,
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu masing-masing berlumba-lumba dahulu-mendahului (menjalankan tugasnya) dengan cara yang sesungguh-sungguhnya;

translations.en_sahih: And those who arrange [each] matter,
translations.en_yusufali: Then arrange to do (the Commands of their Lord),
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta menyempurnakan tadbir urusan alam yang diperintahkan kepadanya; (sumpah demi sumpah, sesungguhnya kamu akan dibangkitkan hidup semula pada hari kiamat)! -

translations.en_sahih: On the Day the blast [of the Horn] will convulse [creation],
translations.en_yusufali: One Day everything that can be in commotion will be in violent commotion,
translations.ms_basmeih: Pada masa berlakunya "tiupan sangkakala yang pertama" yang menggoncangkan alam, (sehingga mati segala yang bernyawa dan punah-ranah sekalian makhluk selain dari yang dikecualikan),

translations.en_sahih: There will follow it the subsequent [one].
translations.en_yusufali: Followed by oft-repeated (commotions):
translations.ms_basmeih: Tiupan yang pertama itu diikuti oleh tiupan yang kedua, (yang menyebabkan orang-orang yang mati semuanya hidup semula serta keluar dari kubur masing-masing);

translations.en_sahih: Hearts, that Day, will tremble,
translations.en_yusufali: Hearts that Day will be in agitation;
translations.ms_basmeih: Hati (manusia) pada hari itu berdebar-debar takut,

translations.en_sahih: Their eyes humbled.
translations.en_yusufali: Cast down will be (their owners') eyes.
translations.ms_basmeih: Pemandangannya tunduk gerun.

translations.en_sahih: They are [presently] saying, "Will we indeed be returned to [our] former state [of life]?
translations.en_yusufali: They say (now): "What! shall we indeed be returned to (our) former state?
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka (yang ingkar) berkata: "Sungguhkah kita akan dikembalikan hidup seperti keadaan di dunia dahulu?

translations.en_sahih: Even if we should be decayed bones?
translations.en_yusufali: "What! - when we shall have become rotten bones?"
translations.ms_basmeih: "Bolehkah (dihidupkan semula) sesudah kita menjadi tulang yang reput?"

translations.en_sahih: They say, "That, then, would be a losing return."
translations.en_yusufali: They say: "It would, in that case, be a return with loss!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka berkata lagi (secara mengejek: "Kalaulah berlaku) yang demikian, sudah tentu kembalinya kita (hidup semula) itu satu perkara yang merugikan!"

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, it will be but one shout,
translations.en_yusufali: But verily, it will be but a single (Compelling) Cry,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Menghidupkan semula tidaklah sukar), kerana berlakunya perkara itu hanyalah dengan satu jeritan (yang terbit dari tiupan sangkakala yang kedua), -

translations.en_sahih: And suddenly they will be [alert] upon the earth's surface.
translations.en_yusufali: When, behold, they will be in the (full) awakening (to Judgment).
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang menyebabkan mereka dengan serta-merta berada di muka bumi yang putih rata.

translations.en_sahih: Has there reached you the story of Moses? -
translations.en_yusufali: Has the story of Moses reached thee?
translations.ms_basmeih: Sudahkah sampai kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) perihal Nabi Musa?

ayahs.arabic: إِذْ نَادَىٰهُ رَبُّهُۥ بِٱلْوَادِ ٱلْمُقَدَّسِ طُوًى
ayahs.transliteration: Ith nadahu rabbuhu bialwadi almuqaddasi tuwan

translations.en_sahih: When his Lord called to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa,
translations.en_yusufali: Behold, thy Lord did call to him in the sacred valley of Tuwa:-
translations.ms_basmeih: Ketika ia diseru oleh Tuhannya di "Wadi Tuwa" yang suci; -

translations.en_sahih: "Go to Pharaoh. Indeed, he has transgressed.
translations.en_yusufali: "Go thou to Pharaoh for he has indeed transgressed all bounds:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Lalu diperintahkan kepadanya): "Pergilah kepada Firaun, sesungguhnya ia telah melampaui batas (dalam kekufuran dan kezalimannya);

ayahs.arabic: فَقُلْ هَل لَّكَ إِلَىٰٓ أَن تَزَكَّىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Faqul hal laka ila an tazakka

translations.en_sahih: And say to him, 'Would you [be willing to] purify yourself
translations.en_yusufali: "And say to him, 'Wouldst thou that thou shouldst be purified (from sin)?-
translations.ms_basmeih: "Serta katakanlah kepadanya: `Adakah engkau suka hendak mensucikan dirimu (dari kekufuran)?

translations.en_sahih: And let me guide you to your Lord so you would fear [Him]?'"
translations.en_yusufali: "'And that I guide thee to thy Lord, so thou shouldst fear Him?'"
translations.ms_basmeih: `Dan mahukah, aku tunjuk kepadamu jalan mengenal Tuhanmu, supaya engkau merasa takut (melanggar perintahNya)? ' "

translations.en_sahih: And he showed him the greatest sign,
translations.en_yusufali: Then did (Moses) show him the Great Sign.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah Nabi Musa menyempurnakan perintah Tuhannya, dan Firaun pun meminta bukti kebenarannya); maka Nabi Musa memperlihatkan kepada Firaun: mukjizat yang besar.

translations.en_sahih: But Pharaoh denied and disobeyed.
translations.en_yusufali: But (Pharaoh) rejected it and disobeyed (guidance);
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu Firaun mendustakan (Nabi Musa) dan menderhaka (kepada Allah);

translations.en_sahih: Then he turned his back, striving.
translations.en_yusufali: Further, he turned his back, striving hard (against Allah).
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian ia berpaling ingkar sambil menjalankan usahanya (menentang Nabi Musa).

translations.en_sahih: And he gathered [his people] and called out
translations.en_yusufali: Then he collected (his men) and made a proclamation,
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu ia menghimpunkan orang-orangnya dan menyeru, -

translations.en_sahih: And said, "I am your most exalted lord."
translations.en_yusufali: Saying, "I am your Lord, Most High".
translations.ms_basmeih: Dengan berkata: "Akulah tuhan kamu, yang tertinggi".

translations.en_sahih: So Allah seized him in exemplary punishment for the last and the first [transgression].
translations.en_yusufali: But Allah did punish him, (and made an) example of him, - in the Hereafter, as in this life.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka Allah menyeksa Firaun di akhirat dan di dunia ini, dengan azab yang menakutkan sesiapa yang mengetahuinya.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ فِى ذَٰلِكَ لَعِبْرَةً لِّمَن يَخْشَىٰٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laAAibratan liman yakhsha

translations.en_sahih: Indeed in that is a warning for whoever would fear [Allah].
translations.en_yusufali: Verily in this is an instructive warning for whosoever feareth (Allah).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya yang demikian itu mengandungi pelajaran yang mendatangkan iktibar bagi orang-orang yang takut (melanggar perintah Tuhannya).

ayahs.arabic: ءَأَنتُمْ أَشَدُّ خَلْقًا أَمِ ٱلسَّمَآءُ ۚ بَنَىٰهَا
ayahs.transliteration: Aantum ashaddu khalqan ami alssamao banaha

translations.en_sahih: Are you a more difficult creation or is the heaven? Allah constructed it.
translations.en_yusufali: What! Are ye the more difficult to create or the heaven (above)? (Allah) hath constructed it:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Wahai golongan yang ingkarkan kebangkitan hidup semula!) Kamukah yang sukar diciptakan atau langit? Tuhan telah membinanya (dengan Kukuh)!

translations.en_sahih: He raised its ceiling and proportioned it.
translations.en_yusufali: On high hath He raised its canopy, and He hath given it order and perfection.
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia telah meninggikan bangunan langit itu lalu menyempurnaKannya,

translations.en_sahih: And He darkened its night and extracted its brightness.
translations.en_yusufali: Its night doth He endow with darkness, and its splendour doth He bring out (with light).
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Ia menjadikan malamnya gelap-gelita, serta menjadikan siangnya terang-benderang.

translations.en_sahih: And after that He spread the earth.
translations.en_yusufali: And the earth, moreover, hath He extended (to a wide expanse);
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan bumi sesudah itu dihamparkannya (untuk kemudahan penduduknya), -

translations.en_sahih: He extracted from it its water and its pasture,
translations.en_yusufali: He draweth out therefrom its moisture and its pasture;
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia mengeluarkan dari bumi itu: airnya dan tumbuh-tumbuhannya;

translations.en_sahih: And the mountains He set firmly
translations.en_yusufali: And the mountains hath He firmly fixed;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan gunung-ganang pula dikukuhkan letaknya (di bumi, sebagai pancang pasak yang menetapnya);

translations.en_sahih: As provision for you and your grazing livestock.
translations.en_yusufali: For use and convenience to you and your cattle.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Semuanya itu) untuk kegunaan kamu dan binatang-binatang ternak kamu.

translations.en_sahih: But when there comes the greatest Overwhelming Calamity -
translations.en_yusufali: Therefore, when there comes the great, overwhelming (Event),-
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka apabila datang hari yang bencananya amat besar, -

translations.en_sahih: The Day when man will remember that for which he strove,
translations.en_yusufali: The Day when man shall remember (all) that he strove for,
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu hari manusia akan mengingati apa yang telah diusahakannya, -

translations.en_sahih: And Hellfire will be exposed for [all] those who see -
translations.en_yusufali: And Hell-Fire shall be placed in full view for (all) to see,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan neraka diperlihatkan kepada sesiapa sahaja yang dapat melihatnya, -

translations.en_sahih: So as for he who transgressed
translations.en_yusufali: Then, for such as had transgressed all bounds,
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka (dapatlah masing-masing mengetahui kesudahannya); adapun orang yang melampau (perbuatan derhakanya), -

translations.en_sahih: And preferred the life of the world,
translations.en_yusufali: And had preferred the life of this world,
translations.ms_basmeih: Serta ia mengutamakan kehidupan dunia semata-mata, -

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed, Hellfire will be [his] refuge.
translations.en_yusufali: The Abode will be Hell-Fire;
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesungguhnya neraka Jahanamlah tempat kediamannya.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِۦ وَنَهَى ٱلنَّفْسَ عَنِ ٱلْهَوَىٰ
ayahs.transliteration: Waama man khafa maqama rabbihi wanaha alnnafsa AAani alhawa

translations.en_sahih: But as for he who feared the position of his Lord and prevented the soul from [unlawful] inclination,
translations.en_yusufali: And for such as had entertained the fear of standing before their Lord's (tribunal) and had restrained (their) soul from lower desires,
translations.ms_basmeih: Adapun orang yang takutkan keadaan semasa ia berdiri di mahkamah Tuhannya, (untuk dihitung amalnya), serta ia menahan dirinya dari menurut hawa nafsu, -

translations.en_sahih: Then indeed, Paradise will be [his] refuge.
translations.en_yusufali: Their abode will be the Garden.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesungguhnya Syurgalah tempat kediamannya.

translations.en_sahih: They ask you, [O Muhammad], about the Hour: when is its arrival?
translations.en_yusufali: They ask thee about the Hour,-'When will be its appointed time?
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka (yang ingkar) selalu bertanya kepadamu (wahai Muhammad) tentang hari kiamat: "Bilakah masa datangnya?"

translations.en_sahih: In what [position] are you that you should mention it?
translations.en_yusufali: Wherein art thou (concerned) with the declaration thereof?
translations.ms_basmeih: Apa hubungannya tugasmu dengan (soal) menerangkan masa kedatangan hari kiamat itu?

translations.en_sahih: To your Lord is its finality.
translations.en_yusufali: With thy Lord in the Limit fixed therefor.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kepada Tuhanmu lah terserah kesudahan ilmu mengenainya.

translations.en_sahih: You are only a warner for those who fear it.
translations.en_yusufali: Thou art but a Warner for such as fear it.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tugasmu hanyalah memberi amaran kepada orang yang takut akan huru-hara hari kiamat itu.

ayahs.arabic: كَأَنَّهُمْ يَوْمَ يَرَوْنَهَا لَمْ يَلْبَثُوٓا۟ إِلَّا عَشِيَّةً أَوْ ضُحَىٰهَا
ayahs.transliteration: Kaannahum yawma yarawnaha lam yalbathoo illa AAashiyyatan aw duhaha

translations.en_sahih: It will be, on the Day they see it, as though they had not remained [in the world] except for an afternoon or a morning thereof.
translations.en_yusufali: The Day they see it, (It will be) as if they had tarried but a single evening, or (at most till) the following morn!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Sangatlah dahsyatnya huru-hara hari itu, sehingga orang-orang yang bersalah merasa) pada masa melihatnya: seolah-olah mereka tidak tinggal di dunia melainkan sekadar satu petang atau paginya sahaja.
